results.title: Treasury Analyst | Jobflarely
highlights:
Treasury Analyst | Jobflarely

Jobflarely.← All Jobs

# Treasury Analyst

Posted May 27, 2026

Veralto is a global leader in essential technology solutions, and they are seeking a highly motivated Treasury Analyst to join their Corporate Treasury team. The role involves supporting global Treasury operations, managing key processes related to cash reporting and banking controls, and contributing to continuous process improvement in a fast-paced environment.

### Responsibilities

- Support Global Treasury operations, including cash reporting, funding, and wire transfers in compliance with internal policies
- Maintain and update bank account documentation and user access records to support audit requirements
- Monitor fee structures and reconcile charges; liaise with bank partners for discrepancies
- Prepare Month end and Quarter end deliverables aligned with accounting close timeliness
- Support M&A and special projects on due diligence and integration activities
- Collaborate with tax, legal, and accounting teams to optimize liquidity via cash repatriation
- Prepare and monitor letters of credit, performance and bid bonds
- Ensure treasury processes adhere to internal controls and documentation standards
- Assist with annual compliance for foreign bank account reporting
- Provide requested documentation and explanations for internal and external audits
- Use AI tools to create dashboards for cash positions, forecasts, and KPIs
- Support capital market initiatives, other projects and or cross-functional projects as needed
- Collaborate with corporate finance, controllership, and operating company teams to establish efficient processes and drive continuous improvement
- Identify risks, issues, and opportunities; recommend and implement solutions with management guidance

Skills

- Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or related field
- 0-2 years of relevant experience in Finance, Accounting, or Treasury; internship or co-op experience in a related discipline preferred
- Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and PowerPoint
- Experience with data tools (e.g., Alteryx, Power BI); experience with Alteryx and/or GenAI preferred
- Interest in pursuing Certified Treasury Professional (CTP) and Bloomberg certification

### Benefits

- Bonus/incentive pay
- A flexible, remote-friendly work environment
- Paid holidays and a permissive paid time off policy emphasizing flexibility and trust
- Ongoing investment in your career through dedicated training, on-the-job development, and coaching
- Total rewards that support your success at work and beyond, including comprehensive health benefits, a 401(k) savings plan with employer match, and associate wellbeing programming with rewards
- Paid time off
- Medical/dental/vision insurance
- 401(k) to eligible employees

Company Overview

- X-Rite is the global leader in color science and technology. It is a sub-organization of Veralto. It was founded in 1957, and is headquartered in Grand Rapids, Michigan, USA, with a workforce of 501-1000 employees. Its website is http://www.xrite.com.

Apply for This Job

# Global IT Security Director

Lead and integrate cybersecurity capabilities across Veralto, spanning governance, risk and compliance (GRC), and third-party risk. Collaborate with security architecture, identity and access management (IAM), security operations and incident response, vulnerability and exposure management, application security, cloud and data security, and operations technology OT security. Develop and mature security operating processes and ensure effective execution through strong engagement with OpCo personnel.

NIST standards CISSP CISM GIAC certifications SOX CRA AI security
[...]
An opportunity for a Global IT Security Director to join a multi-$B global technology innovator at a genuinely interesting moment: newly independent, publicly listed, and with serious M&A growth ambitions.We’re looking for an exceptional GRC-focused Security leader with international, MNC exposure, to lead and integrate cybersecurity across a growing group of diverse businesses. If that sounds like your kind of challenge, read on.The OpportunityVeralto (www.veralto.com / NYSE: VLTO) is a $5.5B annual sales revenue global leader in essential technology solutions, comprising a portfolio of mature businesses. We’re big enough to offer real resources and global reach and focused enough that what you do here genuinely matters.The Global Security Director is a 100% remote position (optimally East Coast/Central US home-based) with periodic travel and is part of the Veralto Global Security senior leadership team, reporting to the VP, Chief Information Security Officer (CISO).The jobholder will lead a small global team that provides fully centralized security services across all 15 Veralto Operating Companies (OpCos), further developing relationships and partnering with technical and business leaders to mature capabilities across governance, risk and compliance, and third-party risk. Planned further M&A activity ensures ongoing further growth of responsibilities and role expansion.The position will also collaborate closely with security architecture and engineering, security operations and incident response, vulnerability and exposure management, application & product security, cloud and data security. As a senior leader, you’ll set direction, remove obstacles, develop talent, proactively identify & mitigate risks, and ensure delivery of key outcomes through clear priorities, metrics, and stakeholder alignment.The role provides the chance to work closely with a group of very different businesses (industrial & water quality equipment manufacturing, laser technology, software, SaaS, AI etc) and provides exceptional career development opportunities into other senior IT leadership positions across Veralto.Your Responsibilities

results.title: Veralto Hiring Software Engineer | Jobformore
highlights:
Veralto Hiring Software Engineer | Jobformore

# Software Engineer

Veralto

Bangalore Freshers Not disclosed Posted today 💼 Intern

Facebook X (Twitter) WhatsApp Telegram LinkedIn Copy Link

Link copied!

## Job Description

As a Software Engineering Intern, you will work alongside experienced engineers on real business applications and technology initiatives. This internship offers an excellent opportunity to gain practical experience in software development, problem-solving, and agile collaboration within a global work environment.

The Intern will work with the DCBU team and will be based in Manyata Tech Park, Bengaluru.

### In this role, you will:

- Participate in software design, development, testing, and debugging activities.
- Work with modern technologies, tools, and development practices.
- Collaborate with team members on feature development and issue resolution.
- Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code.
- Participate in code reviews, technical discussions, and team meetings.
- Learn and apply software engineering best practices and agile methodologies.
- Contribute ideas to improve products, processes, and user experience.

### Preferred Qualifications:

- Go getter, Eagerness to learn, Highly motivated, Seek Help,
- Completed/Pursuing a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Science, Electronics, or related field.
- Good understanding of programming fundamentals and object-oriented concepts.
- Familiarity with one or more programming languages such as C#, or Angular, css etc.
- Basic understanding of web technologies, databases, or cloud concepts is an added advantage.
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
- Good communication and collaboration skills.

### Internship Details:

- Duration: 4-6 months
- Mode: Onsite
- Location: Manyta tech park, Bengaluru, Karnataka
- Opportunity to work with global teams and mentors
- Potential opportunity for full-time conversion based on performance

### Additional Information

Education: Bachelor’s/Master’s degree in Computer Science/Information Science/Electronics

Job Req ID: R10266514

### Key Skills

About the Company

Veralto is a global technology company focused on solutions that help customers improve critical processes, quality, and operational performance across industries. The company holds a strong position in its markets through trusted brands, engineering expertise, and a commitment to innovation and customer value. Veralto is recognized for its scalable technology platforms, collaborative culture, and emphasis on solving real-world business challenges.

# Sr Engr Cslt-Data Science

As a Consultant (Analytics) you will be a pivotal player in modernizing telecom financial operations. Bridging the gap between implementation and architectural strategy, you will design, develop, and deploy advanced AI/ML, Generative AI, and Agentic AI solutions tailored for the finance domain. Your work will transition complex financial workflows—such as Forecasting as a Service, Explainability framework, Funnel Forecasting, Customer Profitability etc., and also performing analyses that impact Bad Debt, Cash flow, Credit Score cut models, etc., among others—into automated, intelligent, and proactive systems.

Engineer robust data pipelines and write complex SQL/BigQuery queries to extract and transform large-scale financial datasets using GCP and Python.

Act as a data storyteller—synthesizing complex AI/ML model outputs into clear, actionable, and prescriptive insights for non-technical finance stakeholders.

Implement MLOps best practices to ensure continuous integration, deployment, and monitoring of financial AI models in production environments.

Driving data-derived insights across the business domain by developing advanced statistical models, machine learning algorithms and computational algorithms based on business initiatives.

Your primary focus will be transforming traditional financial operations into a proactive, AI-driven organization. You are a hands-on builder who thrives at the intersection of core ML, cutting-edge GenAI, and business strategy. You have a knack for rapid prototyping and possess the communication skills required to explain the "why" and "how" of AI to business leaders.

Strong programming proficiency in Python and advanced SQL.

Proven experience working within cloud platforms (Teradata/ GCP) and using tools like BigQuery for large-scale data processing.

Demonstrated experience in rapid prototyping and building solutions leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs) and AI tools (e.g., Claude, Copilot).

Exceptional data storytelling and communication skills, with a proven ability to translate complex technical concepts into confident financial business decisions.

degree (Master’s) in Computer Science, Statistics, Data Science, or a related field.

Posted May 28, 2026

At Veralto we are seeking an HR Service Partner to contribute to the mission of the Shared Services team, which is to deliver the best associate experience and enable our HR teams and associates to focus on the highest-value work through operational excellence, technology and analytics.
[...]
As HR Service Partner you will be a key member of the wider HR team, which is committed to building a workplace that fuels growth, for the business and each one of us. We are transforming our HR organization to deliver compelling experiences every day for our associates, leaders and HR team through strategic partnership to the business, supported by niche expertise in high-value areas and a service organization that meets associate needs every day. Bring your passion for supporting business growth through its talent and organization and join us in our journey!
[...]
This position is part of the HR Services team and will be located in Czechia, and will be remote.
[...]
In this role, you will:
[...]
- Supported by Standard Work, manage assigned caseload for Tier 1 requests to include but not limited to, responding to general inquiries and supporting transactional execution on processes such as preboarding, job and compensation changes, time and attendance, leaves of absence, benefits, etc., ensuring that Service Level Agreements (SLAs) and service quality standards are exceeded every time.​

- Serve as point of contact for inquiries from regional EMEA Associate Groups

- Log and manage tickets/cases in the system.​

- Guide users on self-service tools and knowledge base content​.

The essential requirements of the job include:

- Experience in HR or HR Operations or HR Support, across any discipline and background

- A High School Diploma ​

- Must be fluent in English and any other KEY language for regional support (Czech, Turkish and/or any other EU-Language)​

- Strong communication and problem-solving skills and high attention to detail ​

- Technology system mindset and proficiency with the MS Office suite​

[...]
With annual sales of $5 billion, Veralto is a global leader in essential technology solutions with a proven track record of solving some of the most complex challenges we face as a society. Our industry-leading companies with globally recognized brands are building on a long-established legacy of innovation and customer trust to create a safer, cleaner, more vibrant future.
[...]
Veralto’s Water Quality companies—Aquatic Informatics, ChemTreat, Hach, McCrometer, OTT HydroMet, Sea-Bird Scientific, Trojan Technologies, and XOS—manage, treat, purify, and protect the global water supply, from municipal and wastewater treatment facilities to lakes, rivers, watersheds, and oceans. And our Product Quality & Innovation companies—Esko, Linx, Pantone, Videojet, and X-Rite—protect the world’s food, medicine, and essentials by tracking and authenticating the billions of goods that travel the global supply chain every day. Veralto is headquartered in Waltham, Massachusetts, with 300+ locations worldwide.

results.title: AI Engineer - Go To Market, Temple Terrace, United States of America | Verizon Careers
highlights:
AI Engineer - Go To Market, Temple Terrace, United States of America | Verizon Careers
[...]
# AI Engineer - Go To Market
[...]
- Temple Terrace, Florida
- Rolling Meadows, Illinois
- San Diego, California
[...]
’ll be doing...
[...]
You will be working to design, deploy, and optimize Generative AI solutions that eliminate friction in our Go-To-Market (GTM) engine. You will move beyond traditional data analytics and modeling to build agentic workflows and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems, applying the latest advancements in Foundation Models to create intuitive, AI-native tools that supercharge our sales and marketing teams.
[...]
Building and refining LLM-powered features and autonomous agents to enhance our revenue capabilities.
[...]
Designing and implementing RAG pipelines to connect our proprietary data (e.g., playbooks, product documentation, past successful call transcripts) with large language models for high-accuracy, context-aware outputs.
[...]
Exploring and eliminating other GTM friction points by rapid prototyping AI solutions for lead enrichment, personalized outreach, and CRM automation.
[...]
Integrating AI workflows into the modern sales stack (e.g., Salesforce, Gong) to ensure seamless adoption by our sales reps.
[...]
Developing and maintaining production-grade infrastructure for AI orchestration, including prompt management, low-latency streaming APIs, and model evaluation frameworks.
[...]
Rapid "Vibe Coding" & Prototyping: Use tools like Claude Code, Codex, Lovable, LangSmith Agent Builder, to go from idea to deployed full-stack MVP in days, not weeks.
[...]
You are a builder at heart with a "hacker" mindset and a passion for revenue operations. You are eager to bridge the gap between raw model capabilities and polished tools that actually help sales teams win. You are proactive, iterate quickly, and enjoy the challenge of "taming" non-deterministic AI outputs in high-stakes, real-time environments.
[...]
You’ll need to have:
[...]
Strong proficiency in Python/TypeScript and experience building web services or integrating complex APIs (especially CRM, VoIP, or sales engagement platforms).
[...]
Solid understanding of the LLM stack, including experience with orchestration frameworks (e.g., LangChain/LangGraph, Strands Agents, CrewAI).
[...]
Knowledge of modern AI concepts: Prompt Engineering, few-shot learning, and the difference between fine-tuning and RAG.
[...]
Experience with standard software development tools (Git, Docker) and CI/CD processes.
[...]
A product-oriented and revenue-focused mindset: the ability to deeply empathize with a BDR's workflow and design AI outputs that are instantly actionable during a live call.
[...]
Fearless "Hacker" Mindset: You aren't afraid of code you didn't write. You are comfortable generating 80% of your code with AI and crafting the remaining 20% with high precision.
[...]
Even better if you have one or more of the following:
[...]
Domain expertise in Go-To-Market, RevOps, or Sales tech stacks (Salesforce, Hubspot, Gong, Apollo, Clearbit).
[...]
Experience building real-time audio/speech-to-text processing pipelines (e.g., WebRTC, Deepgram, Whisper) for live transcription and analysis.
[...]
Contributions to open-source AI projects or a portfolio of "weekend" prototypes built with an AI-native toolchain
[...]
Exposure to cloud-based AI services (e.g., AWS Bedrock, Azure AI Studio, or GCP Vertex AI).
[...]
Experience with Vector Databases and semantic search concepts.
[...]
Experience with AI evaluation and observability tools
[...]
Knowledge of "agentic" design patterns

## Veralto

10,000+ employees

B2B • Energy • Science

Veralto is a global enterprise comprising 13 operating companies and over 300 locations worldwide. With a workforce of 16,000 associates, Veralto focuses on impactful work in areas crucial to everyday life, such as water, food, and medicine. The company's Water Quality division manages, treats, purifies, and protects water on a global scale, while the Product Quality & Innovation division ensures the safety and authenticity of essential goods in the global supply chain. Committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workplace, Veralto invests in its employees' growth through hands-on learning and career development opportunities, supported by a global network and the resources of an S&P 500 company.

## Veralto

10,000+ employees

🤝 B2B

⚡ Energy

🔬 Science

B2B • Energy • Science

Veralto is a global enterprise comprising 13 operating companies and over 300 locations worldwide. With a workforce of 16,000 associates, Veralto focuses on impactful work in areas crucial to everyday life, such as water, food, and medicine. The company's Water Quality division manages, treats, purifies, and protects water on a global scale, while the Product Quality & Innovation division ensures the safety and authenticity of essential goods in the global supply chain. Committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workplace, Veralto invests in its employees' growth through hands-on learning and career development opportunities, supported by a global network and the resources of an S&P 500 company.

### 📋 Description

• The maintenance, repair, installation, commissioning, and operation training within the company's facilities as well as in the field. • Assessing customer needs and recommending appropriate products and services • Providing information on technical customer inquiries. • Preparation and submission of technical quotations for the provision of repair, maintenance, and installation of metering equipment

### 🎯 Requirements

• Willingness to travel up to 2/3 days per week (car driving license category B required) • 2 years of professional experience and a degree from a Technical or higher University (Electrical Engineering, or Electronic or Automation) • Good computer skills (Word, Excel, Power Point, Internet, Cloud) • Good knowledge of English language

### 🏖️ Benefits

• 20-25 days of vacation (in addition to bank holidays) • Professional onboarding and training options • Powerful team looking forward to working with you • Career coaching and development opportunities • Company car, mobile phone

results.title: Director, HR Shared Services, APAC | Hirevector
highlights:
for APAC to contribute to the mission of the HR Shared Services team, which is to enable the delivery of the best associate experience and enable our HR teams and associates to focus on their highest-value work through operational excellence, technology and analytics. This role is remote (ideally based in Mumbai / Bangalore) and reports to the Senior Director, HR Shared Services. This role is a key member of the wider HR team, which is committed to building a workplace that fuels growth, for the business and each one of us. We are transforming our HR organization to deliver compelling experiences every day for our associates, leaders and HR team through strategic partnership to the business, supported by niche expertise in high-value areas and a service organization that meets associate needs every day. Bring your passion for supporting business growth through its talent and organization and join us in our journey! Your Responsibilities Bring a regional lens to the development of the global HR Shared Services strategy and roadmap, ensuring a strong linkage to the overall enterprise strategy and culture, with a goal to drive exceptional employee experiences and improved operational efficiencies Contribute to the development and expansion of the Global Service Catalogue based on regional insights and needs Lead your team of regional Tier 1 to Tier 3 Service Partners and Specialists aligned to the Global Service Catalogue and Standard Work Lead the implementation and contribute to the continuous improvement of the internal operational enterprise processes in your region to ensure accurate and timely processing of HR requests Identify automation/Ai opportunities to drive regional innovation, optimization and agility Partner with the Global Process Owners (GPOs) to develop and deploy the regional process harmonization and optimization roadmap Embed the enterprise-wide HR Shared Service performance metrics into your team and drive rigorous management of measurement and continuous improvement initiatives at the regional level Be a change leader within your region, ensuring strong change management and transparent communications to relevant stakeholder audiences Support the continued maturity of the HR operating model within the region Build and manage the regional Shared Services team, providing feedback and coaching to drive team performance, development and engagement SKILLS REQUIRED Minimum of 7 years progressive HR experience; minimum five years as a people manager and experience leading within an HR Shared Services organization in a multi-national, matrixed environment Bachelor’s degree (Masters preferred) in HR, Business, Industrial Relations, Organizational Development or related field Associate-centric with strong stakeholder management skills Strategic and analytical, capable of making data-driven decisions and recommendations Continuous improvement-oriented Experience working within an HR knowledgebase and case management solution and other applications, such as Workday Ability to work in a fast-paced and dynamic environment, managing multiple priorities at any one time At Veralto, we value diversity and the existence of similarities and differences, both visible and not, found in our workforce, workplace and throughout the markets we serve. Our associates, customers and shareholders contribute unique and different perspectives as a result of these diverse attributes. Unsolicited Assistance We do not accept unsolicited assistance from any headhunters or recruitment firms for any of our job openings. All resumes or profiles submitted by search firms to any employee at any of the Veralto companies , in any form without a valid, signed search agreement in place for the specific position, approved by Talent Acquisition, will be deemed the sole property of Veralto and its companies. No fee will be paid in the event the candidate is hired by Veralto and its companies because of the unsolicited referral.

highlights:
AI Go To Market Associate Director, Temple Terrace, United States of America | Verizon Careers
[...]
# AI Go To Market Associate Director
[...]
As the Associate Director of Systems Architecture for Revenue Operations, you will be the primary architect and "AI Copilot" for our GTM engine. You will lead a specialized team of contracted engineers to move beyond basic analytics and build agentic workflows and RAG systems that directly supercharge our sales and marketing teams. This is a high-impact, hybrid role requiring a "hacker" mindset to rapidly prototype AI-native tools that eliminate friction in the sales journey.
[...]
You will be working to architect and deploy Generative AI solutions that eliminate friction in our Go-To-Market (GTM) engine. You will move beyond traditional data analytics and modeling to design and build agentic workflows and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems that drive a create intuitive, AI-native employee experience to our GTM representatives that supercharge our sales and marketing teams.
[...]
Blueprinting: Design large-scale AI solutions, their architecture and the integration with modern enterprise cloud ecosystems
[...]
Discovery: Exploring and eliminating other GTM friction points by rapid prototyping AI solutions for lead enrichment, personalized outreach, and CRM automation.
[...]
Technical Strategy: Drive the strategy of the AI engineering technical team and manage its execution, keeping up to speed with the latest industry knowledge and methods for AI/ML
[...]
AI Evangelism & Enablement: Act as the "AI Copilot" for the revenue and GTM teams. Run internal workshops, drive EnGRAM approvals, create Gemini Gems and agent instruction files, and teach the broader GTM org how to leverage AI tools to 10x their speed and conversion rates.
[...]
AI-Native Engineering & Execution
[...]
Value-Driven Deployment: Own the whole lifecycle of the AI-powered solutions, from build to deployment to performance and cost monitoring
[...]
Developing and maintaining production-grade infrastructure for AI orchestration, including prompt management, low-latency streaming APIs, and model evaluation frameworks.
[...]
Drive Rapid "Vibe Coding" & Prototyping: Use tools like Claude Code, Codex, Lovable, LangSmith Agent Builder, to go from idea to deployed full-stack MVP in days, not weeks.
[...]
AI & Orchestration: Expertise in AWS Bedrock, Bedrock AgentCore, Strands
[...]
Experience with AWS S3, Redshift, and Aurora as the
[...]
AI-Native Software Engineering skills
[...]
Python (Programming Language): Advanced proficiency to guide AI agents and ensure the technical foundation is robust
[...]
Agile Methodology: Lead the team through iterative development cycles, driving continuous improvement and continuous integration (CICD) in AI/ML workflows
[...]
Agent-assisted coding: familiarity with a responsible use of code assistance tool such as Claude Code, AWS Kiro or Github Copilot
[...]
-focused mindset: the ability to deeply empathize with a representative's workflow and design AI outputs that are instantly actionable during a live call.
[...]
Evangelist Energy: You are genuinely excited about AI. You follow the latest releases, read the relevant papers, and can explain why "reasoning models" matter to a non-technical sales or customer success stakeholder.
[...]
possess an 'Agile-for-GTM' approach: prioritizing the rapid feedback loops of a sales cycle over rigid, long-term development sprints. We need someone who can use Agile ceremonies to manage the inherent uncertainty of AI outputs while maintaining a high-velocity deployment schedule.
[...]
Domain expertise in Go-To-Market, RevOps, or Sales tech stacks (Salesforce, Amazon Connect, Gong, Salesloft, Marketo, Gainsight).

Experience with AI evaluation and observability tools

results.title: Staff Data Scientist, Graph ML | Jobflarely
highlights:
Staff Data Scientist, Graph ML | Jobflarely
[...]
# Staff Data Scientist, Graph ML
[...]
Valo Health is a human-centric, AI-enabled biotechnology company working to make new drugs for patients faster. The company’s Opal Computational Platform transforms drug discovery and development through a unique combination of real-world data, AI, human translational models and predictive chemistry.
[...]
Our talented team of biologists, chemists and engineers, armed with advanced AI/ML tools, work together to break down traditional R&D silos and accelerate the speed and scale of drug discovery and development.
[...]
Staff Data Scientist, Graph ML
[...]
About Us Valo Health is a technology company applying human and machine intelligence to accelerate the creation of life-changing medical treatments. At the core of this vision is Valo’s computational platform: an end-to-end, integrated drug discovery and development engine built from the ground up. Valo hires the best and gives them first-class training and support. We approach our work fearlessly, learn quickly, improve constantly, and celebrate our wins. A centerpiece of our culture is our commitment to inclusion across race, gender, age, religion, identity, and experience. Diversity fuels the Valo experience and drives us every day. We strive to create an inclusive workplace that cultivates bold innovation through collaboration and empowers our people to unleash their full potential.
[...]
As Staff Data Scientist, Graph ML, you will develop and deploy graph ML solutions to synthesize and extract novel insights from Valo data in the context of a vast corpus of knowledge in medicine, molecular biology, human genetics, and drugs, to drive compute-enabled biological hypothesis generation. Our innovative platform leverages advanced computational techniques, starting with patient data, to bring better medicines to patients, faster. You will be responsible for developing and delivering graph ML and network biology-based analyses that generate and support drug target hypotheses on the path to discovery of new medicines. You will collaborate closely with a diverse group of data scientists and biologists to enable the contextualization of predicted drug targets within relevant patient subpopulations. You will also be accountable for communicating methodological approaches and key results to internal and external cross-functional stakeholders. Additionally, you will work with other data scientists, software engineers, and data engineers to continue building and improving Valo’s integrated graph platform to accelerate insights across multiple projects and applications.
[...]
A successful candidate brings deep technical expertise in graph machine learning, network analytics, and modern data science best practices, along with experience in biology research in the context of drug discovery, and curiosity and excitement to learn.
[...]
- Lead the design, implementation and application of graph ML and network biology approaches to target discovery from RWD and multi-omic datasets.
[...]
- MS or PhD in a quantitative field with extensive experience at the intersection of machine learning and graph analytics
- Experience in healthcare, medicine, molecular biology, computational biology, or life sciences.
[...]
- Advanced knowledge of and experience with graph ML techniques such as Graph Neural Network (GNN) models applied to link prediction, node classification, and other biomedical-relevant computational tasks, as well as related explainability methods
[...]
- Familiarity with general graph algorithms and relevant Python libraries
[...]
- Strong experience in Python and machine learning and/or deep-learning frameworks (e.g., pytorch)
[...]
- Experience with data science best practices (data provenance, code versioning, reproducibility, git, etc), large-scale data analytics engines (e.g., Spark or Dask), and working in cloud environments (e.g., AWS)
[...]
- Strong data visualization

## Veralto
[...]
Veralto is a global enterprise comprising 13 operating companies and over 300 locations worldwide. With a workforce of 16,000 associates, Veralto focuses on impactful work in areas crucial to everyday life, such as water, food, and medicine. The company's Water Quality division manages, treats, purifies, and protects water on a global scale, while the Product Quality & Innovation division ensures the safety and authenticity of essential goods in the global supply chain. Committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workplace, Veralto invests in its employees' growth through hands-on learning and career development opportunities, supported by a global network and the resources of an S&P 500 company.

results.title: Senior Data Engineer at Verantos - United States Remote
highlights:
Senior Data Engineer at Verantos - United States Remote
[...]
Verantos is a company
[...]
real-world data (RWD) and real-world evidence (RWE) solutions
[...]
. Their platform is
[...]
, pharmacovigilance, and regulatory initiatives using high-validity evidence. Verantos focuses on delivering data with unrivaled richness and reliability, enabling decision-makers in healthcare to understand patient behaviors and predict health outcomes. The company offers products such as the Pragmatic Registry, which collects clinically rich data from patient records to aid in regulatory and reimbursement approvals. Verantos aims to meet increasing demands in the life sciences sector by providing credible and trustworthy evidence at scale.
[...]
# Senior Data Engineer
[...]
Verantos is a company that provides high-quality real-world data (RWD) and real-world evidence (RWE) solutions for the life sciences industry. Their platform is designed to accelerate clinical development and support market access, medical affairs, pharmacovigilance, and regulatory initiatives using high-validity evidence. Verantos focuses on delivering data with unrivaled richness and reliability, enabling decision-makers in healthcare to understand patient behaviors and predict health outcomes. The company offers products such as the Pragmatic Registry, which collects clinically rich data from patient records to aid in regulatory and reimbursement approvals. Verantos aims to meet increasing demands in the life sciences sector by providing credible and trustworthy evidence at scale.
[...]
### 📋 Description
[...]
• Lead the design and evolution of the data platform architecture, establishing patterns and standards the team builds on. • Build and operate production-grade data pipelines that ingest and transform high-variance, real-world clinical data reliably and at scale. • Design for automation from the start: pipelines that detect problems, recover gracefully, and surface issues without requiring manual intervention to run. • Contribute to quarterly data product releases, working closely with product, clinical, customer success teams to meet commitments. • Build data quality tests that reflect the evolving needs of our downstream consumers. • Mentor and elevate other data engineers through code review, architecture decisions, and shared standards. • Actively use and advocate for AI tools that improve the team's development velocity and code quality.
[...]
### 🎯 Requirements
[...]
• 8+ years in data engineering, with experience at a technical lead level. • Production experience with Snowflake and dbt as primary data platform tools. • Strong Python skills for building and maintaining data pipelines. • Has built resilient pipelines on irregular, high-variance data sources and knows what it takes to keep them running without babysitting. • Thinks in systems: designs for observability, failure recovery, and automation. • Can engage meaningfully with the business and domain context around the data, not just the engineering. • Uses AI tools actively in their own work and is curious about applying them within the pipeline, particularly for data quality monitoring and anomaly detection at scale. • Communicates clearly and works well across engineering, product, and clinical stakeholders.
[...]
### Senior Data Engineer, AI & Context Platform, Healthcare Insights, Rev Cycle
[...]
Senior Data Engineer focused on AI context platform for healthcare insights. Leading technical delivery in building scalable data capabilities leveraging unstructured data.

results.title: AI Developer –Agents | Hirequorum
highlights:
AI Developer –Agents | Hirequorum

Hirequorum.← All Jobs

# AI Developer –Agents

Posted May 18, 2026

- About Hach
- Hach is a world leader in the manufacture and distribution of analytical instruments, chemistry, software, and services for testing the quality of water, aqueous solutions, and air. Our products are designed for quality, accuracy, and simplicity. We are committed to providing reliable instrumentation, proven methods, and outstanding support. Working at Hach offers robust career development in a team-centric, growth-oriented environment.

- Hach Mission
- Ensure water quality for people around the world.

- Hach Vision
- We make water analysis better—faster, simpler, greener, and more informative—through unsurpassed customer partnerships, knowledgeable experts, and reliable, easy-to-use products.

- Job Title: AI Developer –Agents
- Location: Remote.
- GCRF Level: Contingent

Employment Type: Contract Role

- Role Overview
- As an AI Developer, you will design, build, and optimize intelligent agents within the Microsoft Copilot ecosystem. You’ll collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver scalable, reliable, and secure AI solutions that enhance productivity and decision-making across the organization.

### Responsibilities

- Develop, test, and deploy Copilot based AI agents using Microsoft AI frameworks and APIs.
- Collaborate with business stakeholders to implement requirements with agent capabilities.
- Integrate Copilot agents with enterprise data sources and SaaS platforms.
- Ensure agents comply with security, privacy, and ethical AI standards.
- Monitor agent performance and implement continuous improvements.
- Document agent architectures, workflows, and best practices.
- Troubleshoot and resolve issues in production environments.
- Stay current with advancements in AI, LLM, and Microsoft 365 technologies.

Focus & Success Looks Like:

- Ownership of agent development lifecycle and delivery of robust solutions.
- Effective cross-functional collaboration with product, IT, and business teams.
- Deployment of agents that drive measurable productivity or process improvements.
- Proactive identification and resolution of technical challenges.
- Clear documentation and knowledge sharing.

### Qualifications

- Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.
- 3+ years f experience in software development.
- 1-3 years of experience in AI development, preferably with Microsoft technologies.
- Proficiency in Python, Copilot SDKs , and experience with Azure AI, OpenAI, or other LLM frameworks.
- Familiarity with enterprise data integration and API development.
- Strong problem-solving and communication skills.
- Ability to work independently and drive strategic initiatives.

What We Offer

- Ownership of high-impact AI projects.
- A collaborative, innovation-driven culture.
- Professional development and growth opportunities.
- Competitive compensation and benefits.

- At Veralto, we value diversity and the existence of similarities and differences, both visible and not, found in our workforce, workplace and throughout the markets we serve. Our associates, customers and shareholders contribute unique and different perspectives as a result of these diverse attributes.

Unsolicited Assistance

We do not accept unsolicited assistance from any headhunters or recruitment firms for any of our job openings. All resumes or profiles submitted by search firms to any employee at any of the Veralto companies, in any form without a valid, signed search agreement in place for the specific position, approved by Talent Acquisition, will be deemed the sole property of Veralto and its companies. No fee will be paid in the event the candidate is hired by Veralto and its companies because of the unsolicited referral.

Apply for This Job

Generative artificial intelligence is transforming how we build products, serve clients, and operate at scale. In the Chief Data and Analytics Office, you will help turn advanced models into dependable, secure, and high-performing production services. You will work with partners across machine learning, cloud engineering, and site reliability engineering to deliver solutions with clear return on investment. If you enjoy hands-on engineering, real-world constraints, and high-impact delivery, this role is for you. As a Senior Associate, Generative AI Engineer in the Chief Data and Analytics Office, you will help design, build, and support production generative artificial intelligence products and reusable backend application programming interfaces used across the firm. You will combine large enterprise datasets with large language and multimodal models to deliver scalable, measurable solutions. You will collaborate closely with machine learning, cloud engineering, and site reliability engineering partners to ensure reliability, performance, and strong operational controls. ## Edge AI Engineer

Join VeroTech as an **Edge AI Engineer** and become part of our community where innovation and people come first.

You'll take on exciting technical challenges and develop your expertise while creating solutions that drive progress across several industries.

About the role - -------------

As an **Application Engineer** for Creative Stage Experiences, you will be instrumental in designing and implementing proof-of-concept applications tailored for interactive, audience-facing stage experiences. Collaborating closely with both artistic and technical partners, you'll ensure seamless integration with existing software and hardware systems.

Key responsibilities - -------------------

* **Design and implement** interactive stage applications.

* Collaborate with partners to **integrate applications** with systems.

* Develop **full-stack** applications, **APIs** , and **edge AI** components.

* Establish robust application and **infrastructure architectures**.

* Setup automated **Quality Assurance** and **testing** systems.

# Principal Architect - Cybersecurity
[...]
Posted Jun 5, 2026
[...]
Reporting to the Global Leader, Security Services, the Principal Architect is a senior individual contributor who serves as a technical authority and trusted advisor across the organization's security program. This role leads through technical credibility, expertise, and influence by shaping security strategy, elevating standards, and driving outcomes across teams, business units, and executive stakeholders. The Principal Analyst partners closely with engineering, operations, and senior leadership to translate complex security risks into clear, business-relevant guidance and recommendations. This position does not include direct people management or budget ownership. This is a remote position, part of the Veralto Global Security team, with occasional travel required.
[...]
- Serve as the authoritative owner of enterprise-wide security architecture, reference architectures, and standards and ensuring they remain current with evolving threats, and emerging technologies as well as ensuring they are embedded into process across engineering and product teams.

- Provides authoritative security guidance across multiple
[...]
to align security strategy with

objectives and adopt consistent standards

[...]
- Lead complex security architecture reviews, evaluating proposed designs, systems, and technologies to identify risk exposures and provide actionable, risk-mitigating recommendations to engineering and product teams.
[...]
- Establish and maintain security architecture principles, patterns, and standards aligned to frameworks such as NIST CSF, ISO 27001, and Zero Trust Architecture.

- Evaluate and advise on the selection of security technologies and tools, assessing fit against organizational needs, risk posture, and strategic direction.

, leveraging expertise, data, and persuasive

[...]
security projects and initiatives from initiation through

with minimal supervision, proactively identifying risks, managing

[...]
- Contribute to the development and maintenance of cybersecurity architectural policies, standards, and guidelines, ensuring they remain current with evolving threats and regulatory requirements.
[...]
The essential requirements of the job include:
[...]
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Security, Management Information Systems, or equivalent combination of education and work experience.

- Typically 10+ years of progressive experience in information security, with demonstrated depth across multiple security domains.

- Proven track record of independently leading and delivering complex, cross-functional security projects and programs with minimal direction.
[...]
- Deep technical expertise in Identity and Access Management / Identity Governance, including PAM, IGA, IAM SSO, MFA, and directory services (e.g., Active Directory, Entra ID).
[...]
- Strong hands-on knowledge of monitoring and detection technologies, including SIEM platforms (e.g., Microsoft Sentinel), EDR/XDR, SOAR, and threat intelligence platforms.
